---
title: "Reading List"
subtitle: "Books and articles I recommend"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
comments: false
---

"A word is known by the company it keeps."

One way to understand me would be to understand what I read. Therefore the following is a collection of written word that I have found to be influential or defining in my thinking, or that I have found to resonate with me well.

Obviously not exhaustive but a good starting point for anyone interested.

# short length

[Aarons Swartz comments about legacy](http://www.aaronsw.com/weblog/legacy)

# medium length

# long length
